_comment: OPERATOR-EDITABLE (reach-channels charter, records/2026-07-14_reach_channels_charter_RATIFIED.md). Which feeds/lists are IN is the operator's curation act (pond-naming). No feed may be added that requires ranking to be useful. trade_press URLs verified live 2026-07-14 (curl -> HTTP 200, parseable RSS 2.0): Utility Dive, Fierce Network (the successor brand of Fierce Telecom -- fiercetelecom.com itself now 403s behind Cloudflare), FreightWaves. Feed swap 2026-07-15 (ratified): Chemical & Engineering News REMOVED; Chemical Industry Digest (chemicals business) + Smart Water Magazine /rss/news (water/desalination) verified live 2026-07-15 (curl -> HTTP 200, parseable RSS 2.0 via digest.parse_feed, fresh items 2026-07-14). Mining slot EMPTY: Mining.com /feed 403 (Cloudflare, even browser UA) and MiningWeekly RSS paths 403, verified failed 2026-07-15. Also failed 2026-07-15: WaterWorld (404 on all RSS paths), ICIS explore feed (parseable but zero items), ChemAnalyst (HTML, not a feed), Desalination.biz (parseable RSS but newest item 2026-04 -- passed over for the fresher Smart Water Magazine). orphan_watch.cohort_limit widened 40 -> 500 (ratified 2026-07-15): effectively uncapped for the current ~448-issuer window -- the first run's cap silently cost ~90% of the channel's reach; the explicit dropped-count note still fires whenever it binds again.
